g.text: Residual Connection Scale Alignment: INT8 Quantization Strategy

text.tspan: Scale alignment is the most common bug in Quantization-Aware Training (QAT).
Without explicit alignment, residual connections effectively inject random noise
Performance Note: In high-performance kernels, we often perform 'Fixed-Point Rescaling'
using bit-shifts and multipliers to avoid expensive FP32 hardware cycles.

g.text: Critical Error: Logic Mismatch in Scale Domains
Operation: Re-projection to Common Floating Point Domain
